claim_text: Primitives under .apm/ are hoisted individually into the consumer's runtime directories during install.

evidence.snippet: # Commands live under ``.apm/prompts/`` and cannot be
"""Integrate primitives from the project's own .apm/ directory.
skills, instructions, agents, prompts, hooks, and commands in .apm/
